description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a complex, multi-gabled roof and a prominent front porch. The main structure is flanked by two detached outbuildings, one of which appears to be a garage or barn with a red exterior and a gray roof. The house features a symmetrical facade with multiple windows, a central entryway, and a driveway leading up to the front. The roof is primarily gabled, with several intersecting sections and dormer windows. The exterior walls are light-colored, contrasting with the red outbuildings. The property is set on a paved lot, suggesting a residential neighborhood context.
description: A two-story suburban house with a multi-gabled roof, central porch, and two red outbuildings, set on a paved lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, central porch, and both red outbuildings behind and to the side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the large red outbuilding and the back of the house, with the driveway extending to the side.
description_view_2: Opposite front view showing the house facade, the smaller red outbuilding directly in front, and the larger outbuilding to the left.
description_view_3: Angled view displaying the side of the house, both outbuildings, and the driveway extending from the main road.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front porch with steps, overhang, and a prominent main door
